title: Msza żałobna
contact_name: Stefan Manojlovic (Grandson), Claire Kolacz (Daughter), Alex Manojlovic (Son)
recording_text:
A fully edited tribute video will be available in a few days, to view or download at the discretion of the family. This will include some or all of the following: coverage of the departure, multiple camera angles and closer views of those speaking.

In the meantime, here is a link to a recording of the stream, for those who may have missed it.
